requirement_topic.zh: 产品认证（NRTL 认可实验室）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品認證（NRTL 認可實驗室）

summary.en: BESS units must be listed by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) to UL 9540 (Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment). The PCS/inverter must additionally be listed to UL 1741 SB (Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources — Supplement B, Grid Support Utility Interactive Equipment) and comply with IEEE 1547-2018 for interconnection. Transport of lithium cells requires UN 38.3 test compliance.
summary.zh: 储能系统须经国家认可测试实验室（NRTL）依据 UL 9540《储能系统及设备标准》完成认证上市。储能变流器（PCS/逆变器）须额外通过 UL 1741 SB 认证，并符合 IEEE 1547-2018 并网互联标准。锂电池运输须通过 UN 38.3 测试。
summary.zht: 儲能系統須經國家認可測試實驗室（NRTL）依據 UL 9540《儲能系統及設備標準》完成認證上市。儲能變流器（PCS/逆變器）須額外通過 UL 1741 SB 認證，並符合 IEEE 1547-2018 併網互聯標準。鋰電池運輸須通過 UN 38.3 測試。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540 (Edition 3, 2023) — Energy Storage Systems and Equipment
UL 1741 SB (2021) — Grid Support Utility Interactive Inverters
IEEE 1547-2018 — Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources
UN 38.3 — Transport of Dangerous Goods: Lithium Battery Testing
IRA 2022 (Inflation Reduction Act) — domestic content bonus credits for ITC/PTC

summary.en: In China, BESS products must obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB/T 36276 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) and GB/T 34131. The grid interconnection standard is GB/T 19964 and NB/T 42061. UN 38.3 transport compliance is also required for export shipments. [UNVERIFIED: exact CCC catalogue scope for utility-scale BESS may vary by product sub-category]
summary.zh: 在中国，储能产品须依据 GB/T 36276（电力储能用锂离子电池）及 GB/T 34131 取得 CCC（中国强制认证）。并网标准为 GB/T 19964 及 NB/T 42061。出口运输同样须符合 UN 38.3。[UNVERIFIED: 大型工商业储能 CCC 目录范围可能因产品子类别而异]
summary.zht: 在中國，儲能產品須依據 GB/T 36276（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）及 GB/T 34131 取得 CCC（中國強制認證）。併網標準為 GB/T 19964 及 NB/T 42061。出口運輸同樣須符合 UN 38.3。[UNVERIFIED: 大型工商業儲能 CCC 目錄範圍可能因產品子類別而異]

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (3C)
GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage
GB/T 34131-2023 — Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage
GB/T 19964-2012 — Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System
NB/T 42061-2015 — Technical Specification of Battery Energy Storage Inverter
UN 38.3 — Transport of Dangerous Goods: Lithium Battery Testing

gap.en: The US requires a multi-layer certification stack — UL 9540 for the integrated system, UL 1741 SB for the inverter/PCS, and IEEE 1547 compliance for interconnection — plus separate AHJ permitting and utility approval. China's CCC single-mark pathway is comparatively streamlined. No single certification mark satisfies both markets. IRA domestic-content rules create additional incentive pressure to source US-made cells/modules, which Chinese-manufactured BESS may not qualify for.
gap.zh: 美国要求多层认证叠加：系统层面的 UL 9540、逆变器层面的 UL 1741 SB、并网层面的 IEEE 1547，以及独立的地方主管机构（AHJ）许可和电网公司审批。中国 CCC 单一标志路径相对简洁。没有任何单一认证标志能同时满足两个市场。IRA 国内含量规定还对采购美国制造电芯/模组产生额外激励压力，中国制造储能产品可能无法享受相应税收抵免。
gap.zht: 美國要求多層認證疊加：系統層面的 UL 9540、逆變器層面的 UL 1741 SB、併網層面的 IEEE 1547，以及獨立的地方主管機構（AHJ）許可和電網公司審批。中國 CCC 單一標誌路徑相對簡潔。沒有任何單一認證標誌能同時滿足兩個市場。IRA 國內含量規定還對採購美國製造電芯／模組產生額外激勵壓力，中國製造儲能產品可能無法享受相應稅收抵免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UL 9540 listing required by NFPA 855 and adopted local codes; UL 1741 SB required by most utilities for interconnection; IEEE 1547 mandatory in all US jurisdictions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for products in the CCC catalogue; GB standards mandatory for grid-connected systems

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese-manufactured BESS entering the US market must obtain UL 9540 NRTL listing plus UL 1741 SB for the inverter — a process distinct from and not substitutable by Chinese CCC certification. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国制造的储能系统进入美国市场，须取得 UL 9540 NRTL 认证及逆变器的 UL 1741 SB 认证，该流程与中国 CCC 认证相互独立、不可替代。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國製造的儲能系統進入美國市場，須取得 UL 9540 NRTL 認證及逆變器的 UL 1741 SB 認證，該流程與中國 CCC 認證相互獨立、不可替代。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律或合規建議。

requirement_topic.en: Installation, Fire Safety & Grid Interconnection Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 安装、消防安全与并网接入审批
requirement_topic.zht: 安裝、消防安全與併網接入審批

summary.en: US BESS installations must comply with NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems, 2023 edition), which sets separation distances, suppression requirements, and maximum energy thresholds per fire compartment. Local Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) issues the building/electrical permit after plan review. Utility interconnection requires execution of an interconnection agreement and, for systems with grid-support functions, demonstration of IEEE 1547-2018 and UL 1741 SB compliance. Some states (e.g. California) additionally require a Large-Scale Energy Storage Safety Assessment. [UNVERIFIED: specific state-level requirements beyond NFPA 855 vary and should be verified with the applicable AHJ]
summary.zh: 美国储能安装须符合 NFPA 855《固定式储能系统安装标准》（2023版），规定了防火间距、抑制要求及每个防火分区的最大能量阈值。地方主管机构（AHJ）在审查图纸后颁发建筑/电气许可证。并网接入须签订并网协议，具有电网支撑功能的系统还须证明符合 IEEE 1547-2018 及 UL 1741 SB。部分州（如加利福尼亚州）额外要求大型储能安全评估。[UNVERIFIED: NFPA 855 以外的各州具体要求因地而异，须向相关 AHJ 核实]
summary.zht: 美國儲能安裝須符合 NFPA 855《固定式儲能系統安裝標準》（2023版），規定了防火間距、抑制要求及每個防火分區的最大能量閾值。地方主管機構（AHJ）在審查圖紙後頒發建築／電氣許可證。併網接入須簽訂併網協議，具有電網支撐功能的系統還須證明符合 IEEE 1547-2018 及 UL 1741 SB。部分州（如加利福尼亞州）額外要求大型儲能安全評估。[UNVERIFIED: NFPA 855 以外的各州具體要求因地而異，須向相關 AHJ 核實]

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 (2023) — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems
IEEE 1547-2018 — Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces
UL 1741 SB (2021) — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources (Supplement B)
IFC (International Fire Code) — Chapter 12, Energy Storage Systems
NEC Article 706 — Energy Storage Systems (NFPA 70, 2023 edition)

summary.en: In China, BESS installation is governed by GB 51048 (Code for Design of Electrical Energy Storage Station) and GB/T 36548 (Technical Requirements for Connection of Battery Energy Storage System to Power Grid). Fire safety requirements follow GB 50016 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings) and relevant local standards. Grid connection approval is handled by the provincial grid company under NDRC and NEA regulations. No equivalent to the US AHJ permit system exists; approvals are consolidated through the grid operator and local energy bureau. [UNVERIFIED: local implementation of GB standards may vary by province]
summary.zh: 在中国，储能安装受 GB 51048《电化学储能电站设计规范》和 GB/T 36548《电化学储能系统接入电网技术规定》约束。消防安全遵循 GB 50016《建筑设计防火规范》及相关地方标准。并网接入审批由省级电网公司依据国家发改委和国家能源局法规处理。不存在与美国 AHJ 许可制度等同的体系；审批通过电网运营商和地方能源局统一办理。[UNVERIFIED: GB 标准的地方执行情况因省而异]
summary.zht: 在中國，儲能安裝受 GB 51048《電化學儲能電站設計規範》和 GB/T 36548《電化學儲能系統接入電網技術規定》約束。消防安全遵循 GB 50016《建築設計防火規範》及相關地方標準。併網接入審批由省級電網公司依據國家發改委和國家能源局法規處理。不存在與美國 AHJ 許可制度等同的體系；審批通過電網運營商和地方能源局統一辦理。[UNVERIFIED: GB 標準的地方執行情況因省而異]

standards_or_laws: GB 51048-2014 — Code for Design of Electrical Energy Storage Station
GB/T 36548-2018 — Technical Requirements for Connection of Battery Energy Storage System to Power Grid
GB 50016-2014 (2018 edition) — Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings
NDRC / NEA Grid Connection Regulations for New Energy Storage (2022)

gap.en: The US imposes a decentralised, layered approval process: NFPA 855 compliance verified by the AHJ at permit stage, a separate utility interconnection agreement, and IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 SB demonstrated at commissioning. Each jurisdiction (city, county, utility) may impose additional requirements. China's approval pathway is centralised through the grid operator and energy bureau, with no direct AHJ equivalent. Chinese BESS OEMs must budget significant time and cost for US AHJ plan review, fire-marshal inspections, and utility interconnection studies that have no counterpart in the domestic approval process.
gap.zh: 美国实行分散的多层审批流程：AHJ 在许可阶段核查 NFPA 855 合规性，单独签订并网协议，并在调试时证明 IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 SB 符合性。每个辖区（市、县、电网公司）可能附加额外要求。中国审批路径通过电网运营商和能源局集中处理，没有直接对应的 AHJ 机制。中国储能企业进入美国市场，须为 AHJ 图纸审查、消防检查及电网并网研究预留充足时间和费用，这些环节在国内审批流程中均无对应项目。
gap.zht: 美國實行分散的多層審批流程：AHJ 在許可階段核查 NFPA 855 合規性，單獨簽訂併網協議，並在調試時證明 IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 SB 符合性。每個轄區（市、縣、電網公司）可能附加額外要求。中國審批路徑通過電網運營商和能源局集中處理，沒有直接對應的 AHJ 機制。中國儲能企業進入美國市場，須為 AHJ 圖紙審查、消防檢查及電網併網研究預留充足時間和費用，這些環節在國內審批流程中均無對應項目。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NFPA 855 adopted by IFC and most US jurisdictions; AHJ permit legally required before energisation; utility interconnection agreement required by FERC Order 2222 and state tariffs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 51048 and GB/T 36548 mandatory for grid-connected storage stations; grid company approval required before commissioning

compliance_verdict.en: Achieving US market access for BESS requires satisfying NFPA 855 fire-safety installation rules, obtaining AHJ permits, and completing a utility interconnection process tied to IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 SB — a multi-agency pathway with no single Chinese equivalent. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 储能系统进入美国市场，须满足 NFPA 855 消防安装规范、取得 AHJ 许可，并完成与 IEEE 1547 及 UL 1741 SB 挂钩的电网并网流程——这是一条多机构审批路径，在中国没有单一对等机制。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 儲能系統進入美國市場，須滿足 NFPA 855 消防安裝規範、取得 AHJ 許可，並完成與 IEEE 1547 及 UL 1741 SB 掛鉤的電網併網流程——這是一條多機構審批路徑，在中國沒有單一對等機制。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律或合規建議。
